data.body: Fix applied (Option B, rule-26-correct): moved plugins/dso/docs/designs/dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.md -> docs/designs/; removed plugins/dso/docs/designs/** from allowlist; updated .test-index and tests/scripts/test-dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.sh path references. Assertion 9 now passes (12/12). Side effect: resolves bug 074a-d1de (migration test failure).
